1.0.1.en: V3 support finetuning and workflow triggering bug fix

1.0.2.en: Added fault states and workflows and insights

1.0.6.en: More V3 tweaks due to different registers

1.0.7.en: Small mapping bug in charge state

1.0.8.en: Power negative inverted to match Homey standard

1.0.9.en: handle missing firmware register for V3 better

1.0.11.en: Removed deprecated set charge power workflow actions

1.0.12.en: flow formatting fixes and build in delay for mode switch

1.1.0.en: Improve connection management for timeouts and retry patterns

1.1.1.en: Added support for bypassmode and extra mode change token

1.1.2.en: Deprecated action card and updated social links

1.1.6.en: Fix on force soc control ui

1.1.7.en: Added ip and slave id config in add wizard

1.2.0.en: Added Homey target_power capability for standard energy management (requires Homey >=12.13.0)

1.3.2.en: modbus package and idle battery bug

1.3.3.en: Diagnostic ringbuffer for work-mode write/read latency, viewable in settings

1.3.4.en: Hot-path optimizations for sustained target_power writes from external orchestrators

1.4.0.en: Clean rebuild from the 1.3.4 baseline. The 1.3.5-1.3.19 series was a long chain of attempts to mask a Marstek V3 firmware-side behaviour (force-command countdown reverts) that turned out not to be an app-side problem at all. Those attempts (keepalive loops, fast-check recovery, force-reconnect on timeouts) destabilised the Modbus connection for many users that were previously stable. 1.4.0 drops all of that and keeps only the genuine wins that stand on their own: per-instance Modbus mutex to prevent overlapping reads/writes from corrupting framing, connection-lifecycle hygiene (in-flight connect promise caching + close grace) to prevent orphaned sockets on the V3's single-client TCP slot, diagnostic API routing through the device's own ModbusClient (no second competing client on app.js), error classifier in logs, safe Homey API wrappers to prevent unhandledRejection after device delete, pollData abort on first wire failure to cut bus load during recovery, persistent setWarning on the device tile after 5 minutes of sustained timeouts, reconnect ceiling raised from 10 to 30 attempts (~4h of trying before unavailable) for transient network blips, and a copy-paste duplicate read removed from pollData.
